caption: A man with glasses and a large, grey, upright wig is recording a podcast in a room filled with framed photos and clothing on racks. He wears a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and brown suspenders, along with over-ear headphones. A black microphone is positioned in front of him. To his right, a white box and clothing items are visible, while the background is a wall of small, square framed pictures. On-screen graphics appear in the lower corners of the frames, featuring a logo with a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". As the scene progresses, the man is speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expressions, while the on-screen graphics intermittently change or shift position slightly. The overall setting appears to be a boutique or a specialized studio space.
